name: 05-09-home-light-component-decomposition
title: Home light component decomposition
description: Replace full-page light homepage artboard with maintainable responsive HTML/CSS sections following 设计参考/index_light.png, preserving full Hero backing where needed to avoid stitched seams.
scope: / home light hybrid Hero-backed DOM replacement decision and verification
creator: lijin
notes: Homepage bright theme now uses a hybrid Hero-backed body replacement. Runtime slice count is 2 (shared nav backing plus full Hero backing); the Hero is a single complete visual slice with transparent accessible hotspots, avoiding the previous left-DOM/right-crop vertical seam. Lower body sections remain real DOM with owned hotspots. Recommendation: proceed to human visual acceptance; only optional future work is nav full-DOM or narrow pixel tuning.

meta.recommendation: human visual acceptance; do not re-split Hero into separate DOM/stage image fragments
meta.known_validation_note: Global image sidecar inventory validator still fails on pre-existing broad 2x sidecar/path/hash expectations; focused homepage element sidecar/2x checks pass.
meta.layout_followup: 2026-05-09: fixed Hero overlap, metric card duplicate text artifacts, and featured-section CTA/bunny overlap after user screenshot feedback.
meta.ghosting_followup: 2026-05-09: nav SVG/chrome real-DOM layers remain for structure/testing but are visually transparent because the nav backing already includes text/chrome; hero bottom-right CTA is now a transparent hotspot over the baked CTA to remove double text.
meta.hero_followup: 2026-05-09: Hero changed to one complete backing image plus transparent hotspots to remove stitched left/right seam from cropped-stage composition.
